content.en:
One by one, these Immortal Realm lords rushed into the depths of the Abyssal Land, trying to find the resources within.

Soon, they encountered the Void Beast of the Immortal Realm.

Bang!!!

The fight began.

They had thought that there were not many Void Beasts in the Immortal Realm, but they underestimated the Void Beasts in the Abyssal Land.

More than a dozen Void Beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm have appeared, and this place is suitable for Void Beasts to fight, although the Lords of the Immortal Realm can suppress these Void Beasts, but it is a little difficult to kill these Void Beasts.

That's when it happened.

An Immortal Realm Lord appeared, grabbed an Immortal Realm Void Beast with one hand, and directly crushed it, but the Void Beast turned into something invisible and converged in the distance, but it was still injured.

"I've seen Lord Chenhai!"

"I've seen Lord Chenhai!"

"I've seen Lord Chenhai!"

Many Immortal Realm Lords said very respectfully.

Lord Chenhai is not an ordinary Immortal Realm Lord, and he is very close to the Immortal Realm, although he has not yet become a half-step Immortal Realm, his real strength is not weaker than the Half-Step Immortal Realm, and it is difficult to kill him even in the Immortal Realm.

Therefore, in countless space-time territories, Lord Chenhai is a very special Eternal Realm Lord.

But what really makes others dare not deal with Lord Chenhai is not his strength, but that he has three clones, which are truly the same strength as the main body and can freely enter other places without restrictions.

The three doppelgangers plus the main body, a total of four bodies, exist in countless space-time territories, and it is difficult to find all his four major bodies.

Once, an Immortal Realm united with eight Immortal Realm Lords to launch a siege against the Chenhai Lord.

The eight Immortal Realm Lords temporarily trapped the two bodies of the Chenhai Lord, while the Immortal Realm personally had the other body.

At first, they only thought that Lord Chenhai only had three bodies, and they paid a lot of money to investigate the location of the three bodies, so they carried out this siege.

But the final result was that the three bodies of the Lord of Chenhai were killed one after another, but they also desperately killed the two Immortal Realms.

Countless years later, the Lord of Chenhai returned, attacked and killed the six living Immortal Realm Lords one after another, and at the cost of the fall of three clones, he also introduced them to a Jedi, which severely damaged the Immortal Realm Lord.

To this day, the Immortal Realm Lord has not fully recovered from his injuries.

Because of this, the Lord of Chenhai has become famous in countless space-time territories.

Therefore, when these Immortal Realm Lords saw Lord Chenhai, they were so respectful that they didn't dare to offend him in the slightest.

Lord Chenhai nodded slightly, and immediately began to deal with these Void Beasts.

The reason why he came here was very simple, it was also to look for an opportunity to break through to the immortal realm.

He also had an Immortal Realm enemy, and if he could break through to the Immortal Realm, he would be sure enough to kill him.

If not, he's afraid he won't be able to kill the other party at all.

With the addition of the Lord of Chenhai, this Void Beast couldn't stop it at all, and was quickly hit hard.

Some of the Void Beasts are a little wise, so they are afraid of the fall. One by one, they fled. "These Void Beasts are really hard to kill!"

Lord Chenhai shook his head and said.

It's a pity that he is already in the Immortal Realm, and such a Void Beast will not help him, otherwise he would really kill some Void Beasts at all costs.

Whoa!!

A Lord of the Immortal Realm went deep into the depths of the Abyssal Land, looking for a so-called opportunity.

And not long after they left, a figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"These Immortal Realm Lords have severely damaged those Immortal Realm Void Beasts, and those Immortal Realm Void Beasts should not come to stop me for the time being!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He followed the attraction of the talent of copying and went deep into the depths of the Abyssal Land.

Soon, the attraction of that mysterious treasure to Ye Tian became stronger and stronger, and he should not be far from the location of that treasure.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to a huge black island.

The treasure that attracted him was on this black island, but just as he stepped into this black island, a black light attacked.

The speed of the black light was too fast, so that Ye Tian couldn't react at all, and his clone was directly killed in seconds.

------------，--------

"That was ...... just now"

Ye Tian's face was solemn.

The black light shot out from the depths of the black island, and he couldn't dodge it, as if his will was frozen, and there was no time to react.

And the distance is too far for his replica body to cover there.

But he could roughly guess that it should be a Void Beast that shot at him, and it was not an ordinary Void Beast, not comparable to a half-step Immortal Realm, that is, comparable to a real Immortal Realm.

His strength was too far away from the Immortal Realm, so he couldn't estimate the strength of the other party.

If he didn't deal with the mysterious Void Beast, he wouldn't be able to go to the black island to find the treasure he needed.

"Those Immortal Lords must be utilized!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he publicized the Black Island and the amazing treasures on the island, and informed the other Eight Extremes Realm of the Eight Poles Tower.

This news will definitely not be hidden, and it will even reach the ears of those Immortal Realm Lords.

When the time comes, those Immortal Realm Lords are afraid that they will go to that black island, that is, they will fight against the mysterious Void Beast.

Once they fight, Ye Tiancai has a chance.

Soon, word spread.

".~ A black island with many precious resources on it, and a powerful Void Beast on it?"

Lord Chenhai also knew this news, pondered for a moment, and immediately prepared to take a look.

The location of the black island was recorded in the news, and he just went to see it, and there was nothing to lose, and if it was true, he had earned it.

Wow!

Lord Tatsumi shuttled through the void and soon arrived at the black island.

At the same time, other Immortal Lords also arrived here, but they vaguely felt the danger.

After all, the strength of these Immortal Realm Lords was far stronger than Ye Tian, so they could naturally sense that something was wrong, but they would not leave just then.

When the lords of Chenhai came, their hearts were settled.

At the very least, with the Lord of Chenhai here, even if that mysterious void beast was very powerful, they wouldn't be unable to deal with it.

Lord Chenhai was not worried at all, and directly stepped into this black island, while the other Immortal Realm Lords also followed, and even a few Lords at the peak of the Immortal Realm came, as if they wanted to join in the fun and find some opportunities.

The moment they entered the Black Island, a stream of black light attacked.

Those Eternal Realm peak lords were not able to dodge, and were killed by a single blow, and the eternal body was shattered, and the eternal origin weapons on their bodies also turned into countless fragments.

And those Immortal Realm Lords also reacted, and they resisted these black lights one after another, but they were all beaten upside down and flew out, all of them looked unsightly, and they were obviously not lightly injured.

Only Lord Chenhai easily resisted the black light attack.

However, this is just an ordinary nihilism of the other party.

Rumble!!!!!

A near-transparent Void Beast appeared, but when the opponent attacked, its arm turned black, and the black light shot out from its fingers.

"It's not good, it's a third-order void beast!"

An Immortal Realm Lord's expression changed drastically. _

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing!(wx_938914883)
